question: Jumoke is fond of carping her sister
section: For this question, choose the option opposite in meaning to the word or phrase in italics
solution: carping; difficult to please; critical. praising; express warm approval or admiration of.

question: It is Iudicrous to suggest that she was a government agent
section: For this question, choose the option opposite in meaning to the word or phrase in italics
solution: Iudicrous ; so foolish, unreasonable, or out of place as to be amusing. sensible; done or chosen in accordance with wisdom or prudence; likely to be of benefit.

question: Mr Solade sent Jimi to Ibadan for the holidays in order to

option.a: save Jimi from Wole's bad influence
option.b: heed Jimi's request to stay with his friends
option.c: allow Jimi spend some time with his friends
option.d: allow Jimi to know more about Ibadan

section: These questions are based on A.H. Mohammed's The Last Days at Forcados High School.

question: Students refused to sympathize with Efua when drinks spilled on her because

option.a: she would not accept their sympathy
option.c: they planned it to disgrace her

section: These questions are based on A.H. Mohammed's The Last Days at Forcados High School.

question: By refusing the offer, he has just cut down his own throat

option.a: He has made a big mistake
option.b: He has made the right decision
option.c: He has given up on his idea
option.d: He has used the Knife on his throat

section: For this question, select the option that best explains the information conveyed in the question.
solution: what is cut your own throat: to behave in a way that will cause harm

question: inoffensive
section: For these questions, choose the most appropriate stress pattern from the options. The Stressed syllable are written in capital letter (s)
solution:
Pronounced as in/of/FEN/sive.
The third syllable is more pronounced.

question: 'D<u>oo</u>r''
section: For these questions, choose the option that has the same vowel sound as the ones represented by the letter (s) underlined

question: Lamide is VERY hostile?
section: The words in capital letters have the emphatic stress. Choose the option to which the given sentence relates.
solution: In responding to questions on emphatic stress, Interrogative sentence that contradicts the emphasized word is the correct option. Option A is the correct answer here.

question: Her death was a bolt from the blue to us
section: For this question, select the option that best explains the information conveyed in the question.
solution: a bolt from the blue; a sudden and unexpected event.

question: Efua's guarded and hostile attitude towards boys could be traced to

option.a: the teachings she had from her cleric
option.b: stories she had heard from her aunt
option.c: the experience she had with her stepfather

section: These questions are based on A.H. Mohammed's The Last Days at Forcados High School.
